summary: Daily Summary Dashboard feature testing complete. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all tabs (Sales, Expenses, Suppliers), date picker, Today/Yesterday buttons, branch filter, and refresh functionality working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Daily Summary page is well implemented with proper data-testid attributes for testing
API returns correct data structure with comprehensive sales, expenses, and supplier breakdowns
Net calculations (net_profit, net_cash_flow) are correctly computed on the backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Summary Dashboard feature is fully functional. The page shows daily metrics including sales breakdown by payment mode (cash/bank/credit/online), expenses by category, supplier payments, top selling items, and recent transactions. Users can filter by date using the date picker or Today/Yesterday buttons, and by branch using the dropdown. The sidebar under Operations group has the Daily Summary link.

daily_summary_page_loads.details: Page loads correctly with title 'Daily Summary'

daily_summary_api_endpoint.details: Returns correct data structure with sales, expenses, suppliers, and summary sections

sales_breakdown_by_payment_mode.details: Shows cash, bank, credit, and online payment totals in the Sales tab

expenses_by_category.details: Expenses tab shows breakdown by category (e.g., Supplier Purchase)

supplier_payments_and_credit.details: Suppliers tab shows payments made and credit purchases

date_picker.details: Date picker allows selecting different dates

today_yesterday_buttons.details: Today and Yesterday quick buttons work correctly

branch_filter.details: Branch filter dropdown is displayed (All Branches default)

tabs_navigation.details: Sales, Expenses, and Suppliers tabs switch correctly

net_calculations.details: Net Cash Flow = Cash Sales - Cash Expenses, Net Profit = Total Sales - Total Expenses

sidebar_navigation.details: Daily Summary link appears in sidebar under Operations group

empty_day_handling.details: Shows 'No sales today' and 'No expenses today' messages for days with no data

data_consistency.details: Yesterday's data showed SAR 400.00 sales, SAR 10.00 expenses, SAR 390.00 profit
